languages.text: "Конечно, Лорд-капитан. Я незамедлительно организую почетную церемонию и повторное освящение".
"Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, Лорд-капитан. Я незамедлительно организую почетную церемонию и повторное освящение".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."
"Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."
"Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."
"Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

languages.text: 「もちろん、艦長様。厳粛な儀式と再奉納の準備を、直ちにいたします」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、艦長様。厳粛な儀式と再奉納の準備を、直ちにいたします。」

languages.text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. Organizaré inmediatamente la ceremonia solemne y la reconsagración».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. Organizaré inmediatamente la ceremonia solemne y la reconsagración».

languages.text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Ich werde umgehend Vorbereitungen für eine feierliche Zeremonie und Weihe treffen."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Ich werde umgehend Vorbereitungen für eine feierliche Zeremonie und Weihe treffen."

languages.text: « Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je vais immédiatement lancer les préparatifs de la cérémonie solennelle et de la reconsécration. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je vais immédiatement lancer les préparatifs de la cérémonie solennelle et de la reconsécration. »

languages.text: “遵命，舰长大人。我将立即着手安排庄严的仪式与重新祝圣的相关事宜。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，舰长大人。我将立即着手安排庄严的仪式与重新祝圣的相关事宜。”

languages.text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. Vakur tören ve yeniden kutsama için derhâl hazırlıklara başlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. Vakur tören ve yeniden kutsama için derhâl hazırlıklara başlayacağım."
